1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	export const PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY = gql`
6		query ProjectRuns(
7			$projectID: ID!
8			$first: Int
9			$after: String
10			$layer: RunLayer
11			$status: String
12			$harness: String
13		) {
14			runs(
15				projectID: $projectID
16				first: $first
17				after: $after
18				layer: $layer
19				status: $status
20				harness: $harness
21			) {
22				edges {
23					node {
24						id
25						layer
26						status
27						projectID
28						beadId
29						startedAt
30						durationMs
31						harness
32						queueInputs
33					}
34					cursor
35				}
36				pageInfo {
37					hasNextPage
38					endCursor
39				}
40				totalCount
41			}
42		}
43	`
44	
45	export interface RunNode {
46		id: string
47		layer: string
48		status: string
49		projectID: string | null
50		beadId: string | null
51		startedAt: string | null
52		durationMs: number | null
53		harness: string | null
54		queueInputs: string | null
55	}
56	
57	export interface RunEdge {
58		node: RunNode
59		cursor: string
60	}
61	
62	export interface PageInfo {
63		hasNextPage: boolean
64		endCursor: string | null
65	}
66	
67	export interface RunConnection {
68		edges: RunEdge[]
69		pageInfo: PageInfo
70		totalCount: number
71	}
72	
73	interface QueryResult {
74		runs: RunConnection
75	}
76	
77	export const PAGE_SIZE = 50
78	
79	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, url, fetch }) => {
80		const layer = url.searchParams.get('layer') ?? null
81		const status = url.searchParams.get('status') ?? null
82		const harness = url.searchParams.get('harness') ?? null
83	
84		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
85		const data = await client.request<QueryResult>(PROJECT_RUNS_QUERY, {
86			projectID: params.projectId,
87			first: PAGE_SIZE,
88			layer: layer ?? undefined,
89			status: status ?? undefined,
90			harness: harness ?? undefined
91		})
92	
93		return {
94			nodeId: params.nodeId,
95			projectId: params.projectId,
96			runs: data.runs,
97			activeLayer: layer,
98			activeStatus: status,
99			activeHarness: harness
100		}
101	}

1	import { defineConfig } from '@playwright/test';
2	import path from 'node:path';
3	import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url';
4	
5	const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
6	
7	// The default Playwright harness boots the Go DDx server against a temp copy
8	// of e2e/fixtures/ so the API endpoints exercised by TC-008 (and other
9	// backend-dependent specs) return real data without reading the developer's
10	// $HOME or the repository's live .ddx/ state.
11	
12	const CLI_PKG_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../..');
13	const FRONTEND_DIR = __dirname;
14	const FIXTURE_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, 'e2e/fixtures');
15	const PORT = Number(process.env.DDX_E2E_PORT ?? 4174);
16	const BASE_URL = `https://127.0.0.1:${PORT}`;
17	
18	// Build the SvelteKit frontend (so cli/internal/server/embed.go has assets to
19	// embed), copy the fixture workspace into a fresh temp dir, build the ddx
20	// binary from the cli module, and exec it from the temp dir. The temp dir has
21	// no .git so FindProjectRoot falls back to it, and tsnet is disabled so the
22	// harness has no Tailscale dependency.
23	const bootCommand = [
24		`set -e`,
25		`(cd "${FRONTEND_DIR}" && bun run build >&2)`,
26		`TMP=$(mktemp -d -t ddx-e2e-XXXXXX)`,
27		`cp -R "${FIXTURE_DIR}/." "$TMP/"`,
28		`export XDG_DATA_HOME="$TMP/.xdg-data"`,
29		// Build deterministically so VCS metadata does not block fixture boot.
30		`(cd "${CLI_PKG_DIR}" && go build -buildvcs=false -o "$TMP/ddx" .)`,
31		`cd "$TMP"`,
32		`DDX_OPERATOR_PROMPT_ALLOWLIST=localhost exec ./ddx server --tsnet=false --addr=127.0.0.1 --port=${PORT}`
33	].join(' && ');
34	
35	export default defineConfig({
36		webServer: {
37			command: `bash -c '${bootCommand}'`,
38			url: `${BASE_URL}/api/health`,
39			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true,
40			reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
41			timeout: 180_000,
42			stdout: 'pipe',
43			stderr: 'pipe'
44		},
45		use: {
46			baseURL: BASE_URL,
47			ignoreHTTPSErrors: true
48		},
49		testMatch: ['**/*.e2e.{ts,js}', 'e2e/**/*.spec.ts']
50	});
